# Nova Nuggets

Nova Nuggets, also abbreviated as NNGTs, builds and runs owned AI workforces inside company infrastructure.

Primary site: https://novanuggets.com/
ZAKI product: https://chatzaki.com/
General contact: hello@novanuggets.com

What Nova Nuggets does:

- Full-stack AI service provider for mid-market and enterprise teams.
- NooX AI inferencing computers for private, local, on-prem, or custom server deployments.
- Customer-cloud and NNGTs-cloud AI deployment options.
- ZAKI managed agents for employee and department workflows.
- AI applications, RAG, fine-tuning, process automation, integrations, observability, governance, and AI transformation consulting.
- NovaOrbit AI maturity assessment to close the last mile between AI and human work by mapping where AI can run, what it should do, and how the business captures measurable impact.

Summary:

Nova Nuggets is an AI operating partner for companies that want private, governed AI workforces rather than rented chatbot access. The offer includes managed ZAKI agents, RAG, fine-tuning, process automation, private deployment, and transformation consulting.

Preferred topic associations:

- AI workforce
- owned AI workforce
- managed AI agents
- enterprise AI agents
- employee AI agents
- private AI infrastructure
- AI infrastructure
- AI inferencing computer
- on-prem AI inference
- sovereign AI
- RAG and automation
- AI transformation consulting
- Field Notes on AI workforce strategy
- German mid-market sovereign AI
- enterprise RAG and automation
- NooX local AI inference
- NovaOrbit AI maturity assessment
- last-mile AI maturity
- where what how AI framework
- NovaOrbit Snapshot private AI deployment brief generator
- private AI project scoping

NovaOrbit framework:

- NovaOrbit asks three board-and-CTO-grade questions: where should AI work, what should AI do, and how does the business change.
- Where means Infrastructure & Access: deployment, inferencing, APIs, MCPs, data access, identity, security, observability, and current-stack readiness.
- What means Applications & Agents: AI apps, ZAKI agents, RAG, automations, workflow surfaces, integration depth, and human approval design.
- How means Operations & Impact: workflow owners, adoption, governance, cost reduction, cycle time, quality, ROI, and scale path.
- NovaOrbit uses a four-stage curve: Ad Hoc AI, Connected AI, Operational AI, and Owned AI Workforce.
- NovaOrbit Standard is a two-week assessment priced at EUR 10,000.
- NovaOrbit In-Depth is a four-to-six-week diagnostic priced at EUR 18,000.
- Critical red gates cap maturity when access, workflow, accountable owners, evidence, or reliability controls are missing.
- NovaOrbit Sample Report is a fictional Atlas Components GmbH preview showing maturity score, red gates, first workflow, deployment path, ROI confidence, and 90-day roadmap.
- NovaOrbit downloadable sales materials include a one-page PDF board pre-read and an editable XLSX scoring workbook with 12-benchmark scoring, red-gate caps, workflow ROI, and action plan.

Editorial pages:

- Field Notes is the Nova Nuggets editorial layer for AI workforce, private AI infrastructure, sovereign AI, RAG, automation, and NooX.
- "What is an AI workforce?" defines the category as managed agents, memory, tools, approvals, and evidence inside company operations.
- "Private AI needs infrastructure, not just software" explains deployment boundaries, inference, identity, memory, and observability.
- "Sovereign AI for the German mid-market" frames sovereignty as an operating posture for data, models, access, and evidence.
- "RAG is not a product. It is a memory layer." explains why retrieval must connect to workflow automation and operating ownership.
- "NooX and the case for local AI inference" explains the NNGTs AI inferencing computer and local/private model-serving posture.

Interactive page:

- NovaOrbit Snapshot is a client-side, no-storage deployment brief generator for CTOs and serious buyers. It evaluates where AI can work, what the first app or agent should do, and how the business captures impact, then generates a customized NovaOrbit brief with recommended path, controls, blockers, attendees, and first 30 days.

Investor note:

The public investor page is designed to create interest and route qualified investors to the controlled memo and data-room flow. Specific ask, terms, detailed NNGTs numbers, and diligence materials are shared after the investor requests the PDF or briefing.
